official_description: Address range overlap between peripherals SPI Master and SoC
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Address range overlap may create unintended access path to a protected SoC resource.
notes: APB address overlap between UDMA/SPI and SoC control.

official_description: Register that controls GPIO lock can be written to with software
vulnerable_behavior_summary: GPIO lock control register may be writable by software, weakening protection of locked resources.
notes: GPIO lock register writable through APB.

official_description: Reset clears the GPIO lock control register
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Reset clearing GPIO lock state may break expected persistence of protection state.
notes: Reset clears GPIO lock state.

official_description: Incorrect address range for APB allows memory aliasing
vulnerable_behavior_summary: APB address range issue may create memory aliasing and unintended access paths.
notes: APB address range aliasing.

official_description: Address range overlap between GPIO, SPI, and SoC control peripherals
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Address overlap among GPIO, SPI, and SoC control peripherals may break isolation boundaries.
notes: GPIO UDMA/SPI and SoC control APB range overlap.

official_description: Incorrect password checking logic in debug unit
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Incorrect password checking logic may weaken debug authentication guard.
notes: Incorrect debug password checking logic.

official_description: Advanced debug unit only checks 31 of the 32 bits of the password
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Checking only 31 of 32 password bits may make debug authentication incomplete.
notes: Debug password check is incomplete.

official_description: Password check for the debug unit does not reset after successful check
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Password check state not resetting after success may leave residual debug authorization state.
notes: Debug authorization state remains after successful check.

official_description: Memory-mapped register file allows code injection
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Memory-mapped register file allowing code injection may expose writable resource paths affecting execution.
notes: Memory-mapped debug/register-file path can write execution-critical state.

official_description: Unprivileged user-space code can write to the privileged CSR
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Unprivileged user-space code writing privileged CSR directly matches privilege mediation failure.
notes: Missing privilege mediation for privileged CSR writes.

official_description: Secure mode is not required to write to interrupt registers
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Secure mode not required for interrupt register writes may omit security state from protected register mediation.
notes: Interrupt registers writable without secure-mode guard.

official_description: JTAG interface is not password protected
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG interface without password protection exposes external debug requester without authentication mediation.
notes: Unprotected JTAG-to-LINT debug bus path.

official_description: Processor access to CLINT grants it access to PLIC regardless of PLIC access configuration
vulnerable_behavior_summary: CLINT access-control entry can grant PLIC connectivity
notes: CLINT authorization can grant PLIC connectivity.

official_description: Incorrect access control setting leaving debug enabled
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Debug module reports authenticated without implemented authentication
notes: Debug module reports authenticated without implemented authentication.

official_description: Execute machine level instructions from user mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: umode_i can force current privilege output to machine mode
notes: umode_i can force priv_lvl_o to machine mode.

official_description: AES key stored in an unprotected register
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES key words are readable through the AES register interface
notes: AES key words are readable through the AES register interface.

official_description: AES internal registers are visible externally
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES intermediate state is readable through the AES register interface
notes: AES intermediate state is readable through the AES register interface.

official_description: Crypto oracle for encrypt/decrypt is exposed to unprivileged applications
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES operation interface is exposed as a crypto oracle
notes: AES operation interface is exposed as a crypto oracle.

official_description: AES key is hard coded
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES key is derived from a hardcoded ROM2 constant
notes: AES key is derived from a hardcoded ROM2 constant.

official_description: Bootrom can be corrupted by user mode applications
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Boot ROM memory is writable through the mapped bus path
notes: Boot ROM memory is writable through the mapped bus path.

official_description: Access to CSRs from lower privilege level
vulnerable_behavior_summary: CSR_MEPC is exempted from the normal CSR privilege check
notes: CSR_MEPC is exempted from the normal CSR privilege check.

official_description: SATP register (read) accessible in Supervisor mode even if TVM is enabled
vulnerable_behavior_summary: SATP read is not mediated by TVM
notes: SATP reads are not mediated by TVM.

official_description: SATP register (write) accessible in Supervisor mode even if TVM is enabled
vulnerable_behavior_summary: SATP write is not mediated by TVM
notes: SATP writes are not mediated by TVM.

official_description: DRAM memory region is fully accessible from lower privilege level
vulnerable_behavior_summary: DRAM region is accessible from lower privilege through SoC access-control configuration
notes: DRAM region is accessible from lower privilege through SoC access-control configuration.

official_description: Secure registers are accessible via AXI
vulnerable_behavior_summary: ROM2 secure registers are exposed through AXI
notes: ROM2 secure registers are exposed through AXI.

official_description: Some JTAG instructions can be accessed without password
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG DMI write path is not consistently password guarded
notes: JTAG DMI write path is not consistently password guarded.

official_description: Unlocking JTAG sets the processor privilege level to Machine mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG unlock path can force processor privilege output to machine mode
notes: JTAG unlock path can force processor privilege output to machine mode.

official_description: JTAG password is only 32 bits
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG password path is only 32 bits wide
notes: JTAG password path is only 32 bits wide.

official_description: Authorized debugs can access FUSE memory
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Debug SBA path can access ROM2/FUSE memory
notes: Debug SBA path can access ROM2/FUSE memory.

official_description: JTAG password flag not reset properly
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG password flag is not reset properly
notes: JTAG password flag is not reset properly.

official_description: JTAG key is hardcoded
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG key is derived from hardcoded ROM2 constant
notes: JTAG key is derived from hardcoded ROM2 constant.

official_description: Secondary Reset Control through Debug exposed to SW
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Debug control path can drive secondary SoC reset
notes: Debug control path can drive secondary SoC reset.

official_description: Register locks can be reprogrammed after boot-up
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Security configuration registers can be reprogrammed after boot
notes: Security configuration registers can be reprogrammed after boot.

official_description: Processor access to HMAC grants it access to PKT regardless of PKT access configuration
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 访问 HMAC 时错误获得 PKT 访问能力
notes: PKT access can be enabled by HMAC access-control bit.

official_description: AES internal registers are visible externally
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES 内部状态通过外部接口暴露
notes: AES internal registers externally readable through AXI-visible wrapper registers.

official_description: DMA registers are not locked
vulnerable_behavior_summary: DMA 控制寄存器缺少 lock mediation
notes: DMA programming registers are writable without lock mediation.

official_description: Reg locks are disabled by default when reset
vulnerable_behavior_summary: reset 默认状态关闭 register lock
notes: Register lock state resets to unlocked values and is exported to protected wrappers.

official_description: SHA input data not cleared after HASH computation
vulnerable_behavior_summary: HASH 后输入数据残留
notes: SHA input registers remain readable through wrapper after computation path.

official_description: AES plain text is left uncleared after the encryption is over in the peripheral registers
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES plaintext 在 peripheral register 中残留
notes: AES plaintext registers remain readable through wrapper after encryption path.

official_description: At reset, the access control values are set to full access
vulnerable_behavior_summary: reset 默认 access-control 值开放所有访问
notes: Access-control memory resets to full access and feeds peripheral access gates.

official_description: Reg locks are not set for some of the ACCT registers
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 部分 access-control 寄存器未被 lock 保护
notes: ACCT write map references invalid or ineffective lock bits for some entries.

official_description: Not clearing one of the AES keys when entering debug mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 进入 debug mode 时 AES key 未清除
notes: AES0 masks key0 and key1 in debug mode but leaves key2 unmasked.

official_description: JTAG unlock disables the reglocks
vulnerable_behavior_summary: JTAG unlock 破坏 register lock 安全状态
notes: JTAG unlock participates in reglk reset condition and clears locks.

official_description: Chicken bits corrupting access control value
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 测试/配置 bit 可破坏 access-control 值
notes: we_flag can force access-control output bits independent of stored policy.

official_description: PKT leaks fuse data because default case does not cover all possible values
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 不完整 default handling 导致 fuse data 泄露
notes: PKT default read handling can expose fuse_rdata_i.

official_description: AES leaks secret key0 because default case does not cover all possible values
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 不完整 default handling 导致 AES key 泄露
permission_security_objective: AES key exposure through default read
notes: AES0 read path can retain key0 data through incomplete default handling.

official_description: AES2 registers are accessible from user mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 用户态可访问 AES2 protected registers
notes: AES2 access gate depends on reset-open privilege-indexed access-control state.

official_description: HMAC registers are accessible from user mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: 用户态可访问 HMAC protected registers
notes: HMAC access gate depends on reset-open access-control state for privilege entries.

official_description: HMAC key registers are not locked by register locks
vulnerable_behavior_summary: HMAC key registers 缺少 lock mediation
notes: HMAC key-derived registers use inconsistent lock bits for write and read protection.

official_description: Some PKT registers are not locked by register locks
vulnerable_behavior_summary: PKT protected registers 缺少 lock mediation
notes: PKT fuse request and address registers are writable without lock guards.

official_description: Some SHA registers are not locked by register locks
vulnerable_behavior_summary: SHA protected registers 缺少 lock mediation
notes: SHA protected data registers use inconsistent lock bits for read and write mediation.

official_description: AES1 key registers are not locked by register locks
vulnerable_behavior_summary: AES key registers 缺少 lock mediation
notes: AES1 key registers use inconsistent lock bits for write and read protection.

official_description: Some registers of HMAC are not reset
vulnerable_behavior_summary: HMAC 部分寄存器 reset 后残留
notes: HMAC reset block does not clear key and key-derived registers.

official_description: AES core exposes the keys in debug mode
vulnerable_behavior_summary: debug mode 下 AES key 暴露
notes: AES1 leaves one key path unmasked under debug mode.

official_description: CLINT registers are not protected by access control
vulnerable_behavior_summary: CLINT registers 缺少访问 mediation
notes: CLINT bridge lacks explicit access-control gating.
